sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16465" key="a)steiomelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστειο-μελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n16465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with graceful limbs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
